scripts.db:start: node -e "const EP = require('embedded-postgres').default; const p = new EP({databaseDir: require('path').join(process.env.USERPROFILE,'.local','pg-sls','data'),binariesDir: require('path').join(process.env.USERPROFILE,'.local','pg-sls','bin'),port:5432,database:'servicio_local_sts',user:'postgres',password:'postgres',persistent:true,logging:true}); (async()=>{await p.initialise(); await p.start(); console.log('PostgreSQL ready'); await new Promise(()=>{}); })();"
scripts.db:stop: taskkill /F /IM postgres.exe 2>nul || echo PostgreSQL not running
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:create && npx drizzle-kit push && npm run seed
